data.title: Encryption
data.description: Spotify employs encryption in transit and at rest to protect user data.
data.technical_spec: TLS for data in transit and AES-256 for data at rest.

data.title: Authentication and Authorization
data.description: Uses OAuth 2.0 for secure authorization and to protect API endpoints.
data.technical_spec: OAuth 2.0 framework with multi-factor authentication (MFA) for sensitive access.

data.title: Threat Detection and Response
data.description: Implements comprehensive monitoring systems to detect and respond to suspicious activities.
data.technical_spec: SIEM solutions and intrusion detection systems (IDS) to ensure proactive threat management.

data.title: Vulnerability Management
data.description: Conducts regular security assessments and patching schedules to mitigate vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Routine penetration testing and automated scanning tools for vulnerability management.

data.title: Privacy Compliance
data.description: Spotify adheres to global privacy laws to ensure user data protection and compliance.
data.technical_spec: GDPR and CCPA compliance frameworks integrated into data management practices.
